Description: Measures number of architecture submissions reviewed by ARB
Calculation: Count of ARB submissions reviewed in period
Target Threshold: Trend stable or improving
Alert Threshold: Decline greater than 20 percent quarter over quarter

Description: Measures elapsed business days from complete submission to ARB decision
Calculation: Average business days from intake complete to decision
Target Threshold: Less than or equal to 10 business days

Description: Measures percentage of material technology changes approved by ARB before implementation
Calculation: Approved-before-implementation count divided by total material changes
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures percentage of required evidence fields completed for ARB submissions
Calculation: Completed required evidence items divided by required evidence items
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures percentage of policy requirements mapped to controls and regulatory drivers
Calculation: Requirements with control and regulatory mapping divided by total requirements
Target Threshold: 100 percent

Description: Measures controls with evidence older than required review cadence
Calculation: Count of controls with stale evidence
Target Threshold: 0 stale critical controls

Description: Measures active architecture exceptions by severity and age
Calculation: Count of open exceptions grouped by severity and aging bucket
Target Threshold: No critical exceptions past due

Description: Measures percentage of waivers remediated by approved expiration date
Calculation: Waivers remediated on time divided by waivers due
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures technologies in contained sunset prohibited or unsupported states
Calculation: Count by lifecycle state and criticality
Target Threshold: Declining trend

Description: Measures progress against approved technology lifecycle remediation plans
Calculation: Closed remediation items divided by planned remediation items
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 90 percent on track

Description: Measures applications rationalized retired consolidated or modernized
Calculation: Completed rationalization actions divided by planned actions
Target Threshold: On plan

Description: Measures applications and services mapped to approved business capabilities
Calculation: Mapped applications/services divided by total in scope
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures completeness of required relationships between business capabilities services applications and CIs
Calculation: Required relationships populated divided by required relationships expected
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures architecture submissions with required security architecture review
Calculation: Submissions with completed security review divided by submissions requiring review
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures APIs registered classified owned and governed as products
Calculation: Compliant APIs divided by total APIs in scope
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures critical services with current resilience and recovery validation
Calculation: Critical services with current validation divided by critical services in scope
Target Threshold: 100 percent critical services

Description: Measures third-party technology decisions reviewed by EA and risk before commitment
Calculation: Reviewed third-party decisions divided by total in scope
Target Threshold: Greater than or equal to 95 percent

Description: Measures AI and emerging technology use cases reviewed through approved governance
Calculation: Reviewed AI use cases divided by total AI use cases in scope
Target Threshold: 100 percent material AI use cases

Description: Measures repeated exceptions against the same standard or pattern
Calculation: Count of exceptions by standard and requesting organization
Target Threshold: No increasing concentration trend
Alert Threshold: Three or more repeat exceptions in quarter

Description: Measures whether monthly governance reporting is produced and distributed on schedule
Calculation: Reports delivered on time divided by reports due
Target Threshold: 100 percent
